tool.name: index_align_scrs
tool.description: Single-Cell RNA-Seq (scRNA-Seq) analysis. Tracks gene expression at single-cell level using cell barcodes.
tool.command: mkdir -p /genome /scratch && #for $element in $genome_collection: ln -s '$element' "/genome/${element.element_identifier}" && #end for #for $element in $scratch_collection: ln -s '$element' "/scratch/${element.element_identifier}" && #end for bash /home/index_align.sh $bamsave > '$output_log' 2>&1 && tar -chzf genome_archive.tar.gz -C /genome . && tar -chzf scratch_archive.tar.gz -C /scratch . && true

param.name: bamsave
param.label: Whether to save the BAM file
